message:
fix(vm-image): fix Tailscale init by removing cloud-init dependency

- Remove cloud-init dependency from stockyard-init.service
  cloud-init was hanging waiting for IMDS before MMDS route was set up,
  blocking stockyard-init which depends on cloud-init.target

- Mask cloud-init services since stockyard-init handles everything

- Add console output to stockyard-init.service for debugging

- Add iputils-ping and curl to ensure init script works

- Add -buildvcs=false to build.sh for consistent builds

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,6 +47,8 @@ RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
     iproute2 \
     iptables \
     dnsutils \
+    iputils-ping \
+    curl \
     # System utilities
     sudo \
     vim \
@@ -200,15 +202,10 @@ RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/stockyard-init.sh
 COPY init/stockyard-init.service /etc/systemd/system/stockyard-init.service
 RUN systemctl enable stockyard-init.service 2>/dev/null || true
 
-# Configure cloud-init for VM initialization
-# Use IMDS datasource first (for Firecracker MMDS), fall back to NoCloud
-RUN mkdir -p /var/lib/cloud/seed/nocloud /etc/cloud/cloud.cfg.d \
-    && cat > /etc/cloud/cloud.cfg.d/99-datasource.cfg <<'EOF'
-datasource_list: [ IMDS, NoCloud, None ]
-datasource:
-  IMDS:
-    metadata_urls: ["http://169.254.169.254"]
-EOF
+# Disable cloud-init - stockyard-init.sh handles all VM initialization
+# cloud-init can hang waiting for IMDS before MMDS route is set up
+RUN systemctl mask cloud-init.service cloud-init-local.service \
+    cloud-config.service cloud-final.service 2>/dev/null || true
 
 # Configure network for DHCP with MMDS route
 # IP is obtained via DHCP from stockyard daemon's dnsmasq

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ GOARCH="${GOARCH:-$(go env GOARCH)}"
 GOOS="${GOOS:-linux}"
 
 echo "Building for ${GOOS}/${GOARCH}..."
-CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS="${GOOS}" GOARCH="${GOARCH}" go build -o stockyard-snapshot .
+CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS="${GOOS}" GOARCH="${GOARCH}" go build -buildvcs=false -o stockyard-snapshot .
 
 if [ ! -f stockyard-snapshot ]; then
     echo "ERROR: Failed to build stockyard-snapshot binary"

@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 [Unit]
 Description=Stockyard VM Initialization
-After=cloud-init.target network-online.target
+After=network-online.target
 Wants=network-online.target
 
 [Service]
 Type=oneshot
 ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/stockyard-init.sh
 RemainAfterExit=yes
-StandardOutput=journal
-StandardError=journal
+StandardOutput=journal+console
+StandardError=journal+console
 
 [Install]
 WantedBy=multi-user.target
